JHIN-STRIKE.title: Strike
JHIN-DEFEND.title: Defend
JHIN-COMMON_SHOT.title: Common Shot
JHIN-PERFECT_SHOT.title: Perfect Shot
JHIN-PERFECT_SHOT.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
[gold]Flourish[/gold]: gain 1 Energy-. -+ and draw 1 card.+
JHIN-WHISPER_BURST.title: Whisper Burst
JHIN-GRACEFUL_FOOTWORK.title: Graceful Footwork
JHIN-GRACEFUL_FOOTWORK.description:
Gain !B! Block.
If you played a [gold]Shoot[/gold] card this turn, gain -3-+4+ additional Block.
JHIN-AIM_SHOT.title: Aim Shot
JHIN-PIERCING_ROUND.title: Piercing Round
JHIN-PIERCING_ROUND.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage to all enemies.
JHIN-DANCING_GRENADE.title: Dancing Grenade
JHIN-DANCING_GRENADE.description:
Deal !D! damage to a random enemy.
Then attack another random different enemy, increasing the damage by -3-+5+.
If that attack kills, the next bounce gains an additional 6 damage.
Bounce up to 4 times.
JHIN-FINISH_OFF.title: Finish Off
JHIN-FINISH_OFF.description:
Deal !D! damage.
If the target is below 50% HP, deal -5-+7+ additional damage.
JHIN-ART_SLICE.title: Art Slice
JHIN-ART_SLICE.description:
Deal !D! damage.
If the target has [gold]Weak[/gold], deal -6-+8+ additional damage.
JHIN-SIDESTEP_FIRE.title: Sidestep Fire
JHIN-QUICK_DRAW.title: Quick Draw
JHIN-REHEARSAL_SHOT.title: Rehearsal Shot
JHIN-REHEARSAL_SHOT.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
If not [gold]Flourish[/gold], draw 1 card.
JHIN-GUNFLAME_GRAZE.title: Gunflame Graze
JHIN-GUNFLAME_GRAZE.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].
[gold]Flourish[/gold]: apply -2-+3+ instead.
JHIN-INTERMISSION_KILL.title: Intermission Kill
JHIN-INTERMISSION_KILL.description:
Deal !D! damage.
If the target has [gold]Mark[/gold], gain -4-+6+ Block.
JHIN-ENCORE_BULLET.title: Encore Bullet
JHIN-ENCORE_BULLET.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
If you played a Skill this turn, deal -5-+6+ additional damage.
JHIN-WHISPERED_THREAT.title: Whispered Threat
JHIN-SET_THE_STAGE.title: Set the Stage
JHIN-SET_THE_STAGE.description:
Gain !B! Block.
Apply -1-+2+ [gold]Mark[/gold] to a random enemy.
JHIN-CALCULATED_PLAN.title: Calculated Plan
JHIN-CALCULATED_PLAN.description:
Draw 2 cards.
If you have -1-+1 or 0+ [gold]Bullet[/gold], gain 1 Energy.
JHIN-BACKSTEP.title: Backstep
JHIN-BACKSTEP.description:
Gain !B! Block.
If you played a [gold]Shoot[/gold] card this turn, draw 1 card.
JHIN-SET_TRAP.title: Set a Trap
JHIN-SET_TRAP.description:
Gain !B! Block.
Apply 1 [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold] to the target.
JHIN-CALM_RELOAD.title: Calm Reload
JHIN-OBSERVE_WEAKNESS.title: Observe Weakness
JHIN-OBSERVE_WEAKNESS.description:
Apply -2-+3+ [gold]Mark[/gold].
If the target is below 50% HP, draw 1 card.
JHIN-PERFECT_STANCE.title: Perfect Stance
JHIN-PERFECT_STANCE.description:
Gain !B! Block.
If you have 4 [gold]Bullets[/gold], gain -6-+8+ additional Block.
JHIN-AWAIT_APPLAUSE.title: Await Applause
JHIN-AWAIT_APPLAUSE.description:
Gain !B! Block.
Next turn start: gain 1 Energy.
JHIN-COUNT_BEATS.title: Count Beats
JHIN-COUNT_BEATS.description:
Draw -1-+2+ card(s).
If you have 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold], draw 1 more.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-COMPOSED.title: Composed
JHIN-MUZZLE_RHYTHM.title: Muzzle Rhythm
JHIN-MUZZLE_RHYTHM.description: Every 4th Attack card played: gain 1 Strength-. -+ and 1 Dexterity.+
JHIN-AUDIENCE_SEATED.title: Audience Seated
JHIN-SHOW_PLAN.title: Show Plan
JHIN-BLOODY_STAGE.title: Bloody Stage
JHIN-BLOODY_STAGE.description: When an enemy first drops below 50% HP, apply -2-+3+ [gold]Mark[/gold].
JHIN-INTERMISSION.title: Intermission
JHIN-INTERMISSION.description: The first non-Shoot Attack each turn deals -3-+5+ additional damage.
JHIN-GUN_MAINTENANCE.title: Gun Maintenance
JHIN-GUN_MAINTENANCE.description: Whenever you reload, draw 1 card-. -+ and gain 2 Block.+
JHIN-ACTORS_INSTINCT.title: Actor's Instinct
JHIN-ACTORS_INSTINCT.description: If you didn't [gold]Flourish[/gold] this turn, gain 1 Strength next turn-. -+ and 1 Dexterity.+
JHIN-STAGE_CONTROL.title: Stage Control
JHIN-GRAND_STAGE.title: Grand Stage
JHIN-GRAND_STAGE.description:
Gain !B! Block.
Apply 1 [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold] to all enemies.
JHIN-LONG_RANGE_SNIPE.title: Long-Range Snipe
JHIN-LONG_RANGE_SNIPE.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
Deal -3-+4+ additional damage per [gold]Mark[/gold] on the target.
JHIN-DEADLY_FLOURISH.title: Deadly Flourish
JHIN-DEADLY_FLOURISH.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
If the target has [gold]Mark[/gold], apply -1-+2+ [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
[gold]Flourish[/gold]: apply -2-+3+ instead.
JHIN-RELOAD.title: Reload
JHIN-FOURTH_ACT.title: Fourth Act
JHIN-FOURTH_ACT.description:
Can only be played with 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
For each 10% HP the target has lost, increase this damage by 10%.
Lost HP percentage is rounded down to the nearest 10%.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-FLOURISH_TEMPO.title: Flourish Tempo
JHIN-FLOURISH_TEMPO.description: Whenever you trigger [gold]Flourish[/gold], gain 1 Energy-. -+ and draw 1 card.+
JHIN-CURTAIN_CALL.title: Curtain Call
JHIN-CURTAIN_CALL.description:
Can only be played with 0 [gold]Bullets[/gold].
Attack random enemies {shotCount} times for !D! damage.
Lower-HP targets take more damage, up to {maxDamageBonusPercent}% more.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-DEADLY_SHOT.title: Deadly Shot
JHIN-DEADLY_SHOT.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
If the target has no [gold]Weak[/gold], deal -6-+8+ additional damage.
JHIN-LOTUS_DETONATION.title: Lotus Detonation
JHIN-LOTUS_DETONATION.description:
Deal -6-+8+ damage per [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold] on the target,
then remove all [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold].
JHIN-DEATH_BLOOM.title: Death Bloom
JHIN-WHISPER_VOLLEY.title: Whisper Volley
JHIN-WHISPER_VOLLEY.description:
Spend 2 [gold]Bullets[/gold].
Deal !D! damage to all enemies 2 time(s).
JHIN-ENCORE_REHEARSAL.title: Encore Rehearsal
JHIN-ENCORE_REHEARSAL.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
If not [gold]Flourish[/gold], draw 1 card and gain 1 Energy.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-CURTAIN_PIERCE.title: Curtain Pierce
JHIN-CURTAIN_PIERCE.description:
Deal !D! damage.
Deal -3-+4+ additional per [gold]Mark[/gold] on the target.
Does NOT remove [gold]Mark[/gold].
JHIN-BLOODLINE_ART.title: Bloodline Art
JHIN-BLOODLINE_ART.description:
Deal !D! damage.
If the target is below 50% HP, deal -7-+9+ additional damage.
JHIN-GUNNERS_GIFT.title: Gunner's Gift
JHIN-GUNNERS_GIFT.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
If this kills the target, gain -12-+15+ Block.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-LENS_LOCK.title: Lens Lock
JHIN-LENS_LOCK.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
Apply -2-+3+ [gold]Mark[/gold], preserving existing marks.
[gold]Flourish[/gold]: apply -3-+4+ instead.
JHIN-THIRD_GUNSHOT.title: Third Gunshot
JHIN-THIRD_GUNSHOT.description:
Can only be played with 2 [gold]Bullets[/gold].
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
JHIN-FIRST_GUNSHOT.title: First Gunshot
JHIN-FIRST_GUNSHOT.description:
Can only be played with 4 [gold]Bullets[/gold].
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
Apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Apply 1 [gold]Mark[/gold]-.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]-+.+
JHIN-SECOND_GUNSHOT.title: Second Gunshot
JHIN-SECOND_GUNSHOT.description:
Can only be played with 3 [gold]Bullets[/gold].
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
If the target has [gold]Mark[/gold], deal -4-+7+ additional damage.
JHIN-STACCATO_FIRE.title: Staccato Fire
JHIN-GORGEOUS_EXECUTION.title: Gorgeous Execution
JHIN-GORGEOUS_EXECUTION.description:
Deal !D! damage.
If this kills the target, gain 2 Energy.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-PERFECT_RELOAD.title: Perfect Reload
JHIN-BARREL_CALIBRATION.title: Barrel Calibration
JHIN-BARREL_CALIBRATION.description:
Apply -2-+3+ [gold]Mark[/gold].
If the target already had [gold]Mark[/gold], gain -1-+2+ Energy.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-EXIT_ROUTE.title: Exit Route
JHIN-EXIT_ROUTE.description:
Gain !B! Block.
If you have 0 [gold]Bullets[/gold], draw 2 cards.
JHIN-LENS_FOCUS.title: Lens Focus
JHIN-SILENT_AUDIENCE.title: Silent Audience
JHIN-SILENT_AUDIENCE.description:
Gain !B! Block.
Apply -1-+2+ [gold]Weak[/gold] to all enemies.
JHIN-PERFECT_FINALE.title: Perfect Finale
JHIN-PERFECT_FINALE.description:
Gain !B! Block.
If you triggered [gold]Flourish[/gold] this turn, gain 2 Energy.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-HIDDEN_MECHANISM.title: Hidden Mechanism
JHIN-DEATH_NOTICE.title: Death Notice
JHIN-SHOW_PAUSE.title: Show Pause
JHIN-POSITION_SWAP.title: Position Swap
JHIN-DEATH_IS_ART.title: Death is Art
JHIN-DEATH_IS_ART.description: When an enemy first drops below 50% HP, gain -1-+2+ Strength (once per enemy).
JHIN-LOTUS_WORKSHOP.title: Lotus Workshop
JHIN-LOTUS_WORKSHOP.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Mark[/gold], also apply -1-+2+ [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold].
JHIN-AUDIENCE_CHEER.title: Audience Cheer
JHIN-CAREFUL_ARRANGEMENT.title: Careful Arrangement
JHIN-CAREFUL_ARRANGEMENT.description: At the start of your turn, draw -1-+2+ additional card(s).
JHIN-FINAL_ACT_FORESHADOWING.title: Final Act Foreshadowing
JHIN-FINAL_ACT_FORESHADOWING.description: At the start of your turn, gain -1-+2+ Energy.
JHIN-PERFECT_TRAJECTORY.title: Perfect Trajectory
JHIN-MASTERPIECE_BORN.title: Masterpiece Born
JHIN-MASTERPIECE_BORN.description: When [gold]Mark[/gold] is consumed by a [gold]Shoot[/gold], draw -1-+2+ card(s).
JHIN-AESTHETIC_OF_FOUR.title: Aesthetic of Four
JHIN-AESTHETIC_OF_FOUR.description: If you start your turn with 4 [gold]Bullets[/gold], gain 1 Energy-. -+ and draw 1 card.+
JHIN-LAST_ACT.title: Last Act
JHIN-LAST_ACT.description:
Can only be played with 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
[gold]Flourish[/gold]: gain 3 Energy.
JHIN-PERFECT_WORK.title: Perfect Work
JHIN-PERFECT_WORK.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage, plus -4-+5+ per [gold]Flourish[/gold] this combat.
JHIN-DEATH_MONOLOGUE.title: Death Monologue
JHIN-DEATH_MONOLOGUE.description:
Deal !D! damage.
If target is below 30% HP, deal -40-+50+ more.
If it kills, gain 2 Strength.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-FULL_HOUSE_CHEER.title: Full House Cheer
JHIN-FULL_HOUSE_CHEER.description:
Deal !D! damage to all enemies.
Gain 1 Energy per kill.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-QUARTET.title: Quartet
JHIN-QUARTET.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Hit a random enemy 4 times for !D! damage.
[gold]Flourish[/gold]: deal -7-+8+ per hit.
JHIN-PERFECT_HIT.title: Perfect Hit
JHIN-PERFECT_HIT.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
If the target has [gold]Mark[/gold], deal -12-+15+ additional.
JHIN-CURTAIN_CALL_AFTERMATH.title: Curtain Call Aftermath
JHIN-CURTAIN_CALL_AFTERMATH.description:
Can only be played with 0 [gold]Bullets[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-LAST_AUDIENCE.title: Last Audience
JHIN-PRECISE_CURTAIN_CALL.title: Precise Curtain Call
JHIN-PRECISE_CURTAIN_CALL.description:
Set your [gold]Bullets[/gold] to 0.
Gain -2-+3+ Energy.-+.+ Draw 1 card.+
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-PERFECT_LOADING.title: Perfect Loading
JHIN-PERFECT_LOADING.description:
Reload your [gold]Bullets[/gold] to 4.
Gain -2-+3+ Energy.-+.+ Draw 1 card.+
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-CURTAIN_CALL_PREP.title: Curtain Call Prep
JHIN-DEADLY_STAGE.title: Deadly Stage
JHIN-DEADLY_STAGE.description:
Apply -2-+3+ [gold]Mark[/gold] and -2-+3+ [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold] to all enemies.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-PERFECT_PERFORMANCE.title: Perfect Performance
JHIN-PERFECT_PERFORMANCE.description:
Reload your [gold]Bullets[/gold] to 4.
Gain !B! Block.
Gain -2-+3+ Energy.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-WHISPER_ECHO.title: Whisper Echo
JHIN-WHISPER_ECHO.description: When you trigger [gold]Flourish[/gold], gain -1-+2+ Energy and draw -1-+2+ card(s).
JHIN-FATEMAKER.title: Fatemaker
JHIN-FATEMAKER.description:
Increase your Max Energy by 1.
At the start of your turn, automatically fire 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold] at a random enemy for -6-+9+ damage.
JHIN-PERFECT_CRIME.title: Perfect Crime
JHIN-PERFECT_CRIME.description:
Gain -4-+5+ Strength.
At the start of your turn, gain -1-+2+ additional Strength.
JHIN-FINAL_ACT_ART.title: Final Act Art
JHIN-FINAL_ACT_ART.description: At the start of your turn, if any enemy is below -30%-+50%+ HP, gain -2-+3+ Energy.
JHIN-SOUL_SHOT.title: Soul Shot
JHIN-SOUL_SHOT.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
Apply 2 [gold]Mark[/gold].
If killed, restore 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
[gold]Flourish[/gold]: deal 28 damage, apply 4 [gold]Mark[/gold] and 3 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] instead.
JHIN-FINAL_ACT_RELOAD.title: Final Act Reload
JHIN-FINAL_ACT_RELOAD.description:
Reload your [gold]Bullets[/gold] to 4.
Draw 3 cards.
Your next [gold]Shoot[/gold] this turn triggers [gold]Flourish[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-SHOOT_DISABLED_NO_BULLETS: The chamber is empty... but art never relied on gunpowder.
